title: ‘Married at First Sight’ Rape Allegations Lead to Call for U.K. Investigation
summary_full: Two women told the BBC that they were sexually assaulted during the filming of the popular show. The accusations have reignited a debate in Britain about the ethics of reality TV.
summary_public: Two women told the BBC that they were sexually assaulted during the filming of the popular show. The accusations have reignited a debate in Britain about the ethics of reality TV.
